name: Golden Bloom Necklace
description: A delicate layered necklace featuring hand-crafted floral pendants in 18K gold plating. Each bloom is intricately detailed, making this piece the perfect statement for any occasion. The adjustable chain ensures a comfortable fit for all necklines.
shortDescription: Delicate layered floral pendant necklace in 18K gold plating.

name: Rose Aurora Earrings
description: Inspired by the soft hues of dawn, the Rose Aurora earrings are crafted with rose gold plating and feature a graceful teardrop silhouette. Lightweight and hypoallergenic, they are designed for all-day comfort.
shortDescription: Graceful teardrop earrings in rose gold plating.

name: Celestial Charm Bracelet
description: A stunning adjustable bracelet adorned with celestial charms — stars, moons, and sunbursts — in gleaming gold plating. The adjustable lobster clasp fits wrists from 6 to 8 inches. A timeless piece that layers beautifully.
shortDescription: Adjustable charm bracelet with stars, moons & sunbursts.

name: Velvet Solitaire Ring
description: A bold yet refined solitaire ring featuring a cushion-cut cubic zirconia set in 18K gold plating. The tapered band adds a modern architectural touch while keeping the focus on the brilliant center stone.
shortDescription: Cushion-cut CZ solitaire ring in 18K gold plating.

name: Heirloom Pearl Set
description: A complete three-piece set featuring a pearl pendant necklace, matching stud earrings, and a delicate bracelet. Each faux pearl is lustrous and uniform, set in gold-plated prongs for a classic, heirloom aesthetic.
shortDescription: Three-piece faux pearl necklace, earring & bracelet set.

name: Midnight Oxidised Cuff
description: An artisan-crafted wide cuff bracelet in dark oxidised silver plating with etched geometric motifs. Bold, edgy, and completely unique, this cuff is a statement piece for the contemporary woman.
shortDescription: Wide oxidised silver cuff with etched geometric motifs.

name: Lotus Drop Earrings
description: Inspired by the sacred lotus, these drop earrings feature a multi-layered petal design in gold plating. The lightweight structure ensures comfort for all-day wear while the elegant silhouette elevates any outfit.
shortDescription: Multi-layered lotus petal drop earrings in gold plating.

name: Serpentine Chain Necklace
description: A sleek, minimalist serpentine chain necklace in rose gold plating. The smooth woven links catch the light beautifully and can be worn alone or layered with pendants for a personalised look.
shortDescription: Minimalist serpentine chain necklace in rose gold plating.
